snippet.title: Dhurandhar The Revenge Official Hindi Trailer | Ranveer S | Aditya D | In Cinemas 19 March 2026
snippet.description:
Ab Pakistan ka mustakbil, Hindustan tay karega
Dhurandhar The Revenge Trailer Out Now.  Book Now for Paid Previews on 18th March only.

Releasing worldwide on 19 March, on Gudi Padwa, Ugadi, and Eid.

Jio Studios presents
A B62 Studios Production

An Aditya Dhar Film
DHURANDHAR THE REVENGE 

Written, Directed and Produced by Aditya Dhar
Produced by Jyoti Deshpande
Produced by Lokesh Dhar

Trailer Scored, Composed and Produced by Shashwat Sachdev

Ari Ari Song Credits: 
Composed, Arranged and Programmed by Shashwat Sachdev
Vocals: Navtej Singh Rehal (Bombay Rockers), Khan Saab, Jasmine Sandlas & Sudhir Yaduvanshi
Rap Performed and written by Reble, Token 
Lyrics by Irshad Kamil, Bombay Rockers
Score Producer Adam Lucas
Music Supervisor: Adarsh Vishwakarma

Director of Photography - Vikash Nowlakha
Editor: Shivkumar V. Panicker
Music and Background Score: Shashwat Sachdev
Casting Director: Mukesh Chhabra, CSA
Executive Producer: Rahul H. Gandhi
Character & Prosthetics Designer: Preetisheel Singh D‚ÄôSouza
Sound Designer: Bishwadeep Chatterjee
Costume Designer: Smriti Chauhan
Action Directors: Aejaz Gulab, Sea Young Oh, Yannick Ben, Ramazan Bulut
Choreographer: Vijay Ganguly
Additional Screenplay: Shivkumar V. Panicker, Ojas Gautam
Additional Production Designer: Rupin Suchak
Associate Director & Second Unit Director: Rohun Rege
Chief Assistant Director: Sameer Sadhwani
Director‚Äôs Assistant: Ojas Gautam
Creative Producer: Aarsh Vora
Assistant Producer: Shweta Vora
Line Producer: Naseer Ahmed Khan
Research Consultant: Aditya Raj Kaul, Dibya S.
Associate Editor: Sumit Dhole, Juhi Gopalakrishnan
Marketing Manager: Chelsea Gupta
Production Sound Mixers: Manas Bal, Prabal Pradhan
Post Producer: Gautmik
Re-Recording Mixer: Justin Jose K (CAS)
VFX Supervisor: Dhruti Ranjan Sahoo
VFX Studios: Envision VFX, Philm CGI, Redefine, R2 VFX
DI Studio: Redefine
DI Colourist: Ashirwad Hadkar (ISC)
Digital Agency: White Rivers Media
PR Agency: Communique Film PR
Marketing Agency: MAX Marketing Ltd
Teaser and Trailer Editor: Ojas Gautam
Dubbing & Localization: Annapurna Studios
Visual Promotion: Jayesh Shikarkhane & Team
Publicity Design: Ma & Th (Marching Ants & Trigger Happy)

Jio Studios Team
COO & CFO: Priyanka Chaudhary
CEO Production and Distribution: Deepak Sharma
Chief Legal Officer: Dipti Kotak
PR Head: Amita Naidu

Dhurandhar The Revenge introduces Jaskirat Singh Rangi, tracing the chain of events that compel him to become Hamza Ali Mazari, and follows his rise as he operates deep inside Pakistan. The film is set to return this time in Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Kannada and Malayalam.

19 March 2026
In Cinemas Worldwide
A Jio Studios Release

snippet.title: DHURANDHAR THE REVENGE Trailer Reaction! | Ranveer Singh | Arjun Rampal | Sanjay Dutt | Aditya Dhar
snippet.description:
Jaby and Achara react to the explosive trailer of the upcoming spy-action sequel Dhurandhar: The Revenge, a high-stakes continuation of the blockbuster franchise directed by Aditya Dhar. The trailer teases an intense revenge-driven story filled with brutal action, political intrigue, and powerful confrontations as the conflict escalates across borders. ‚öĒÔłŹūüĒ•

The film features a powerhouse cast led by Ranveer Singh (Padmaavat, Gully Boy, Bajirao Mastani), alongside Sanjay Dutt (KGF: Chapter 2, Munna Bhai M.B.B.S.), R. Madhavan (Rocketry: The Nambi Effect, 3 Idiots), Arjun Rampal (Ra.One, Om Shanti Om), Akshaye Khanna (Drishyam 2, Border), and Sara Arjun (Deiva Thirumagal, Saivam), all bringing intensity and depth to this gritty espionage thriller. The trailer promises larger-than-life action, emotional stakes, and a story fueled by revenge and patriotism.

#DhurandharTheRevenge #RanveerSingh #TrailerReaction #BollywoodReaction #SpyThriller #IndianCinema

snippet.title: Banjaare - Bairan (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Banjaare - Bairan
Stream/Download ~

~ Music INFO ~
Title: Bairan
Singer/Lyricist/Composer: BANJAARE
Music: Roni
Mix-Master: Gurie
Animation : Ham_mah.10


~ Follow Banjaare ~ 
https://www.instagram.com/official_banjaare?igsh=eWd5MGIwbXpscThk&utm_source=qr

Lyrics ~ Banjaare - Bairan
Manne saambh-saambh raakhe
Tere jhanjhraa ke jode
Meri gel ro-ro ye bhi
Chhori bawle se hore

Manne aaye jaave khyaal tere
Khaaye jaave khyaal tere
Jeen konya deti
Haaye...
Bairi tanhaai manne

Geeta mein gaai kade
Chaati ke lagaai manne
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai manne

Saambh-saambh raakhi bahut
Chaati ke lagaai manne
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai manne

Ho...
Maarya-maarya phire
Dekh haal tu bichare ka
Tere bina jeena bhi
Ke jeena banjaare ka

Khoya rahun yaad teri
Kar ke nadaaniyaan
Batuwe mein rakhun teri
Saambh ke nishaaniyaan

Tere bina kaal horeya
Theek konya haal mera
Haath jodun Ram dede
Saansa te rihaai manne

Geeta mein gaai kade
Chaati ke lagaai manne
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai manne

Saambh-saambh raakhi bahut
Chaati ke lagaai re
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai re

Je tu thodi ghabra jya
Meri yaad tanne aa jya
Tu de diye awaaz re main
Aa jaaunga

Todun duniya ki reet
Re ke haar re ke jeet
Manne chahiye teri preet
Main nibha jaaunga

Dekh bawla bana gi
Manne likhna sikha gi
Haaye... noch-noch khaagi
Teri bairan judaai manne

Geeta mein gaai kade
Chaati ke lagaai manne
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai manne

Saambh-saambh raakhi bahut
Chaati ke lagaai re
Jit bhi gaya re
Teri yaad khadi paai re

Aaj taai nibhaun jo si
Kasam thi khaai manne
Zindagi saari ya meri
Tere lekhe laai manne

snippet.title: Why Dhurandhar: The Revenge Could Be India‚Äôs BIGGEST EVER Movie
snippet.description:
In this video, we talk about the details seen in the Dhurandhar: The Revenge trailer. The trailer does not reveal much of the story, but some scenes give hints about the plot and how the story might move forward. We discuss how the film appears to focus on Pakistan‚Äôs proxy war tactics and how the narrative may develop around that theme. The trailer also seems to show parts of Ranveer Singh‚Äôs character‚Äôs early life before his mission connected to Pakistan. We also cover the strong reactions and discussions that started after the trailer was released, showing how much hype the movie has created. Reports suggest that another film, Toxic, postponed its release around the same time. We also discuss how newer directors like Aditya Dhar are bringing a different style and approach to Bollywood storytelling.

Jaizeey Music presents "Sheesha (Official Audio)", a new haryanvi song for 2026. This latest haryanvi song is sung by Mitta Ror and Swara Verma, with lyrics penned by Mitta Ror. The track, also known as "aakhya mein aankh mane ghali jo beran", is a must-listen for fans of haryanvi songs. You can find more of Mitta Ror in this sheesha mitta ror production.

snippet.title: Sanam Teri Kasam - 8K/4K Music Video | Harshvardhan Rane | Himesh Reshammiya | Ankit Tiwari, Palak M
snippet.description:
Relive the timeless romance with the stunning 8K/4K music video of "Sanam Teri Kasam" from the movie Sanam Teri Kasam. Featuring the heartfelt chemistry of Harshvardhan Rane and Mawra Hocane, this soulful track is beautifully composed by Himesh Reshammiya and sung by Ankit Tiwari and Palak Muchhal.

#sanamterikasam #8k #8kvideo #harshvardhanrane #mawrahocane #ankittiwari #palakmuchhal #himeshreshammiya 

Description:
Song - Sanam Teri Kasam
Singer - Ankit Tiwari, Palak Muchhal
Composer - Himesh Reshammiya
Lyricist - Himesh Reshammiya, Sameer Anjaan

Lyrics:
Betahasha dil ne
Tujhko hi chaaha hai
Har duaa mein maine
Tujhko hi maanga hai

Tera jaana jaise koi baddua
Tera jaana jaise koi baddua
Door jaaoge jo tum
Mar jaayenge hum
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam..

Tumhe dekhte hi aankhen ho jaati namm
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam..

Huaa ye kya hashar mera
Judaa huaa sabar mera
Main tere bin ek lamha
Kyun kabhi naa jiya

Raat bhar ashqo ne tujhko pukara hai
Har dua main maine tujhko hi maanga hai

Tera jaana jaise koi baddua
Door jaaoge jo tum
Mar jaayenge hum
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam..

Tumhe dekhte hi aankhen ho jaati nam
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam...

Nasha tera dil ko lagaa
Dena nahi mujhko dagaa
Main teri aadat ka maara
Hai kya meri khataa

Tere bin naamumkin
Apna guzaara hai
Har duaa mein maine
Tujhko hi maanga hai

Tera jaana jaise koi baddua
Door jaaoge jo tum
Mar jaayenge hum
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam..

Tumhe dekhte hi aakhen ho jaati nam
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam o..
Sanam teri kasam..

snippet.title: TATEEREE | Mhare Ri Mandere Pe Boli He Tatiri | New Haryanvi Song 2026 | Badshah | Haryanvi Song
snippet.description:
TATEEREE | Mhare Ri Mandere Pe Boli He Tatiri | New Haryanvi Song 2026 | Badshah | Haryanvi Song
TATEEREE | Ghuti Dyu Ghuti Dyu Boli He Tatiri | New Haryanvi Song 2026 | Latest Haryanvi Song

#tateereesong #tatirisong #tateeree #badshah #badshahsong #badshahnewsong #haryanvi #haryanvisong #haryanvisongsharyanavi #haryanvisongs #haryanvigane #hrsong #newharyanvisong #newharyanvisongsharyanavi2025 #haryanvidjsong #haryanviculture  

A fresh and energetic New Haryanvi Song 2026 ‚Äď ‚ÄúTATEEREE (Ghuti Dyu Ghuti Dyu Boli He Tatiri)‚ÄĚ, presented by Haryanvi Star Records, bringing the vibrant flavor of Haryana‚Äôs folk rhythm and modern music together.

snippet.title: Ishqa'n De Lekhe song (Official Teaser) | Gurnam Bhullar| Isha Malviya | New Punjabi Movie 2026
snippet.description:
Ishqa'n De Lekhe (Official Trailer) | Gurnam Bhullar | Isha Malviya | New Punjabi Movie 2026
 

 Get ready to fall in love all over again! Speed Records presents the trailer for the most-awaited Punjabi love story of
2026- "Ishga'n De Lekhe"
Starring the sensational Gurnam Bhullar alongside the stunning Isha Malviya, this Punjabi cinema is crafted for every soul that has ever loved deeply. Directed by the talented Manvir Brar, Ishqa'n De Lekhe is set to redefine Punjabi romance on the big screen.
After delivering back-to-back blockbusters with Lekh and Surkhi Bhindi, Gurnam Bullar returns with yet another masterpiece - and this one is nothing short of magical. This new Punjabi movie is the story that speaks the language of love & is destined to become an evergreen classic of Punjabi cinema.
Mark your calendars. Book your seats. Releasing in cinemas on 6th March 2026
#IshqanDeLekhe #GurnamBhullar #IshaMalviya
#PunjabiMovies #PunjabiMovieTrailer #NewPunjabiMovie
#SpeedRecords #PuniabiMovie2026

Female Lead : Isha Malviya
Directed by: Manvir Brar
Story/Screenplay/Dialogue: Jassi Lohka
Produced By: Gurnam Bhullar
Executive Producer: Jaswinder Lahri
Music on: Speed Records

snippet.title: Tuition Badmashi Kaa - Hemant Faujdar, Kiran, Masoom Sharma, Manisha Sharma, Ajay Dhankhar, AmanJaji
snippet.description:
Tuition Badmashi Kaa - Hemant Faujdar, Kiran Brar, Masoom Sharma, Manisha Sharma,  Aman Jaji, Ajay Dhankhar, Narender Jaji, Zipsi Studio, Saya Films.

Singer: Masoom Sharma, Manisha Sharma
Lyrics: Ajay Dhankhar
Music/Composer: Aman Jaji

#tuitionbadmashikaa  #desirecords  #haryanvi  


Black Moon Films Presents Tuition Badmashi Kaa penned by Ajay Dhankhar, performed by Mr. Hemant Faujdar & Miss Kiran Brar, sung by Mr. Masoom Sharma, Miss Manisha Sharma Ji, harmony by Mr. Aman Jaji, lived by Mr. Ajay Dhankhar & Mr. Narender Jaji

Starring: Hemant Faujdar, Kiran Brar
Supporting Actor: Arun Malik, Kiyaan Malik, Madhav Maddy
Singer: Masoom Sharma, Manisha Sharma
Lyrics: Ajay Dhankhar
Music: Aman Jaji
Director: Ajay Dhankhar
Art Director: Vijay Giri
Action Director: Vishal Bhargav
Assistant Director: Vivek Garg, Narender Jaji, Rohit Dhankhar
Creative Head: Narender Jaji
Camera Team A: Aakash Ganga Films
Camera Team B: Saya Films
DOP: Sunil
Edit: Zipsi Studio
VFX: Himanshu Gulia
Publicity Design: Pankaj Kumar (+91-89492-12414)
Music Streaming Poster Design: Sumit Bamal
Photography & BTS: Simran Ubhi
Production: Akash Ganga Films & Manjeet Productions
Makeup: Mithoon
Project By: Ajay Dhankhar
Promotions: Urbane Loop Media

Hoo Diet Teri Ka Raaz Bata Kyun Mare Khoon Ubada Re
Panipat Me Faer Tera Gunje Pura Ambala Re
Hoo Diet Teri Ka Raaz Bata Kyun Mare Khoon Ubada Re
Panipat Me Faer Tera Gunje Pura Ambala Re

Na Chalda Tera Business Koi Na Job Teri Sarkari Hai
Na Chalda Tera Business Koi Na Job Teri Sarkari Hai
Na Job Ter Sarkari Hai

Sooya Ki Re Baat Chood Tu Dhund Ke Dikha Hzara Mein

Sooya Ki Re Baat Chood Tu Dhund Ke Dikha Hzara Mein
Re Gaat Me Jaan Ya Bhari Padi Janu Nila Ford Saan Athasi Ka

Tere Yaar Ne Khola Centre Tuition De Badmashi Ka
Tere Yaar Ne Khola Centre Tuition De Badmashi Ka
Kit Karna Asla Use Gori Kit Karna Use Gndasi Ka
Ohh Ankh Aag Te Laal Teri Aur Asla Hardam Sath Rhve
Entry Teri Pe Sare Haan Kyun Pache Police Tainat Rahve
Tere Pache Police Tainat Rahve

Na Chalda Tera Business Koi Na Job Teri Sarkari Hai
Na Chalda Tera Business Koi Na Job Teri Sarkari Hai

Ho Tere Yaar Ne Paade Filter Mehkme Sarkari Ke
Mehkme Sarkari Ke‚Ä¶

Tere Yaar Ne Khola Centre Tuition De Badmashi Ka

Sunya Tera Itihas Mane Samunder Te Bhi Gehra Hai
Udti Udti Khabar Mile Teri Encounter Ki Tyari Hai
Udti Udti Khabar Mile Teri Encounter Ki Tyari Hai

Whether you're looking for a Punjabi pop song to groove to, a dance song for parties, or the latest Punjabi song to vibe with friends, this new song delivers the perfect mix of music and energy.

snippet.title: ROAST | Team India ke ye khilaadi nikle World Cup ke asli heroes | IND vs NZ | Cricket
snippet.description:
#TeamIndia #T20WorldCup2026 #INDvsNZ #WorldCupHeroes #IndianCricket #CricketRoast #CricketAnalysis #TeamIndiaChampion #CricketFans #WorldCupFinal #CricketTalk #CricketComedy

Team India‚Äôs historic triumph in the T20 World Cup 2026 Final against New Zealand was not just about one star ‚ÄĒ it was a complete team effort. In this ROAST episode, we reveal the real heroes of India‚Äôs World Cup campaign who stepped up when it mattered the most.
From clutch batting performances under pressure to game-changing bowling spells and smart captaincy decisions, several Indian players played crucial roles throughout the tournament. But which players truly carried Team India to the trophy? Who delivered consistently from group stage to the final? And which unexpected performers became the silent match-winners?
This episode breaks down the biggest performances of the tournament with sharp analysis, fan reactions, memes, and entertaining roasting. We look beyond headlines to celebrate the players whose contributions defined India‚Äôs World Cup victory.
If you enjoy cricket discussions mixed with humor, debates, and honest opinions, this video is for you.

localized.title: ROAST | Team India ke ye khilaadi nikle World Cup ke asli heroes | IND vs NZ | Cricket
localized.description:
#TeamIndia #T20WorldCup2026 #INDvsNZ #WorldCupHeroes #IndianCricket #CricketRoast #CricketAnalysis #TeamIndiaChampion #CricketFans #WorldCupFinal #CricketTalk #CricketComedy

Team India‚Äôs historic triumph in the T20 World Cup 2026 Final against New Zealand was not just about one star ‚ÄĒ it was a complete team effort. In this ROAST episode, we reveal the real heroes of India‚Äôs World Cup campaign who stepped up when it mattered the most.
From clutch batting performances under pressure to game-changing bowling spells and smart captaincy decisions, several Indian players played crucial roles throughout the tournament. But which players truly carried Team India to the trophy? Who delivered consistently from group stage to the final? And which unexpected performers became the silent match-winners?
This episode breaks down the biggest performances of the tournament with sharp analysis, fan reactions, memes, and entertaining roasting. We look beyond headlines to celebrate the players whose contributions defined India‚Äôs World Cup victory.
If you enjoy cricket discussions mixed with humor, debates, and honest opinions, this video is for you.

snippet.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters
snippet.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters. You asked for it. The continuation of the series. This was absolutely insane.

Follow my socials:
‚ěĹ Twitter - @dream
‚ěĹ Instagram - @dreamwastaken
‚ěĹ Snapchat - @dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop

BadBoyHalo: @thesaintsofgames 
George: @GeorgeNotFound 
Sapnap: @Sapnap 
Antfrost: @Antfrost 
awesamdude: @awesamdude 
CaptainPuffy: @CaptainPuffy 

We decided to call this series Minecraft Manhunt. This video is a different rendition of it, where there are SIX hunters instead of THREE hunters or just one.

This is a new Minecraft but, 1.21.11 challenge that we have decided to try. I try to beat the game, while my friend George AND my friend Sapnap AND my friend BadBoyHalo AND my friend Antfrost AND my friend awesamdude AND my friend CaptainPuffy tries to prevent me from doing it. It's a race, and it's super intense and we had a lot of laughs. I love doing these challenges.

If this video gets 500,000 likes we'll do a rematch!

Not Minecraft, But Water Rises or Minecraft, But Lava Rises, or any other but challenge like that. This is a speed run / speed runner of Minecraft against a killer / assassin

#MinecraftManhunt

Wir haben diese Serie "Minecraft Manhunt" genannt. Dieses Video ist eine etwas andere Version davon: Es gibt SECHS J√§ger anstelle von nur DREI J√§gern oder nur einem.

Das ist eine neue "Minecraft, aber" Herausforderung, in Version 1.21.11, die wir ausprobieren. Ich versuche, das Spiel zu besiegen, w√§hrend mein Freund George UND mein Freund Sapnap UND mein Freund BadBoyHalo UND mein Freund Antfrost UND mein Freund Awesamdude UND meine Freundin CpatainPuffy versuchen, mich daran zu hindern. Es ist ein Wettlauf, super spannend und wir haben jede Menge gelacht. Ich liebe diese Herausforderungen.

Wenn dieses Video 500.000 Likes bekommt, wird es ein Rematch geben!

Nicht etwa "Minecraft, aber Wasser steigt" oder "Minecraft, aber Lava steigt" oder irgendeine √§hnliche "aber" Herausforderung. Dies ist ein Speedrun / Minecraft Speedrunner gegen einen Killer/Assassinen.

#MinecraftManhunt

snippet.title: Easily 3 Star Dragon Escape Challenges 5-8 (Clash of Clans)
snippet.description:
How to 3 Star Levels 5 to 8 of the Hero Campaign: Dragon Escape Challenges in Clash of Clans. Judo Sloth provides a tutorial for the new event attacks which celebrate the launch of the Dragon Duke Hero. The March Season is Dragon Themed for the Dragon Duke and comes with numerous events, including Free Equipment or Starry Ore on the Supercell Store. Thank you for using code judo to support the channel. Best of luck with your 3 stars!

Free Equipment or Starry Ore on Supercell Store: https://store.supercell.com/en?boost=judo 

Suggested Videos: 
Challenges Level 1-4 Guide: https://youtu.be/y5Pxn752gvI
Dragon Duke Explained - New Hero: https://youtu.be/SyHlEE8woTE

Thank you for using Code 'Judo' in Clash of Clans to support me.
Supercell Store: https://store.supercell.com/en?boost=judo 
In Clash of Clans: https://bit.ly/CodeJudo

I'm part of Supercell's Creators Program; find more information here: https://creators.supercell.com/en/supercell-partner

snippet.title: LAARE : Maninder Buttar | Sargun Mehta | B Praak | Arvindr Khaira | Punjabi Song| Lyrical
snippet.description:
Enjoy the official video of Punjabi song LAARE (ŗ®≤ŗ®ĺŗ®įŗ©Ä) by Maninder Buttar featuring Sargun Mehta music & composition by B Praak also lyrics penned by Jaani video directed by Arvindr Khaira and produced by Gunbir Singh Sidhu & Manmord Sidhu. Click here to Subscribe Ishtar Punjabi channel for Punjabi songs : http://bit.ly/SubscribeWhiteHillMusic

Song Credits :

Song : Laare
Singer : Maninder Buttar
Featuring : Sargun Mehta
Music & Composer : B Praak
Lyrics : Jaani
Video by : Arvindr Khaira
Editor : Adele Pereira
Mix and master: Gurjinder Guri & Akaash Bambar
Colorist : Pranav Manna
Guitars : Shomu Seal
Shehnai- Rajendra G Salunke
Supporting cast: Jaskaran Saini & Simran Sharma
Creative Director / Steadicam Operator :- Amaninder Singh
Dop :- Sayed Tanveer
Choreographer: Sahaj Singh, Shreoshi
Assistant Director :- Satnam , Sukhman sukhu, Sonia
Make up :- Rajan Pasai
Hair By : Rashid
Production :-  Neeraj Bhatt
Produced by : Gunbir Singh Sidhu & Manmord Sidhu
Online Promotions : Pixilar Studios

Lyrics : 

Main sab kuj chad dita tere karke
Tere uton sab kuj vaari baithi aan
Tainu pta taan hai par fikar nai
Tere layi main yaara ve kawaari baithi aan
Yaari teri ve yaari
Jisaman tak aa sari di sari yaari
Yaari teri ve yaari
Jisaman tak aa sari di sari
Ve dhakka hona mere naal
Mainu pta bas Laare aa
Ve tu viah nai karona mere naal
Mainu pta bas Laare aa
Ve tu viah nai karona mere naal
Mainu pta bas Laare aa
Ve tu viah nai karona mere naal
Yaari teri ve yaari
Jisaman tak aa sari di sari yaari
Yaari teri ve yaari
Jisaman tak aa sari di sari
Akhiyan ch surma main pauna chadhta
Jaggde hi rahiye haye sona chadhta
Akhiyan ch surma main pauna chadhta
Jaggde hi rahiye haye sona chadhta
Tere piche chadhte main gharde mere
Tere piche hassna hasona chadhta
Kyun rauley pauna mere naal
Mainu pta bas Laare aa
Ve tu viah nai karona mere naal
Mainu pta bas Laare aa
Ve tu viah nai karona mere naal
Na kise joga chadhe aitbaar na kareyo
Kade kise shayar nu pyar na kareyo
Shayiri vaayiri sun dil vaar na kareyo
Kise joga chadhe aitbaar na kareyo
Jaani naal laayian te pta laggeya 
Kade kise Shayar naal pyaar naa kareyo
Mera hoyea bura haal
Mainu pta bas Laare aa
Ve tu viah nai karona mere naal
Mainu pta bas Laare aa
Ve tu viah nai karona mere naal

Belagayithu Yelu O Muddu Benaka | Benaka Benaka Ekadanta | Vinayaka Bhakti Songs Kannada


Listen to the divine Belagayithu Yelu O Muddu Benaka and Benaka Benaka Ekadanta Kannada devotional songs dedicated to Lord Ganesha (Vinayaka / Ganapathi), the remover of obstacles and the giver of wisdom, success, and prosperity.

These beautiful Vinayaka Bhakti Songs in Kannada are popular devotional songs sung by devotees during morning prayers, Ganesh worship, and special occasions. Listening to Ganapathi devotional songs with devotion brings peace, positivity, and divine blessings into life.

Start your day with these powerful Ganapathi Bhakti Geethegalu and receive the blessings of Lord Ganesha for happiness, prosperity, and success.


#BelagayithuYelu #BenakaEkadanta #VinayakaSongs #GanapathiSongs #WednesdayDevotionalSongs #KannadaDevotionalSongs #kannadabhaktisongs
